title: No Ceasefire in Southern Lebanon as IDF Strikes Hezbollah Amid Escalating Attacks

contents:
# No Ceasefire in Southern Lebanon as IDF Strikes Hezbollah Amid Escalating Attacks

## Overview
Israel declares no effective ceasefire in southern Lebanon due to ongoing Hezbollah drone attacks, prompting IDF to intensify strikes killing at least nine.

## Details
IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir confirmed there exists no ceasefire on the ground as operations against Hezbollah continue despite a US-brokered truce declared April 16 and extended last week. Lebanon's national news agency reported Israeli airstrikes killed at least nine people, targeting homes reduced to rubble in southern Lebanon. A UN-backed report states over 1.22 million Lebanese, nearly a quarter of the population, face acute hunger this year due to conflict, displacement, and economic pressures. Hezbollah drone attacks persist, leading Israel to ramp up military responses.

## Location
Southern Lebanon

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @cnni OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
Israel, Hezbollah, Lebanon, ceasefire, IDF strikes, Middle East conflict, airstrikes, humanitarian crisis
